name: agent-skills
description: First-party default skill pack for agent runs.

agentSkills.name: Reviewer
agentSkills.description: Review plans and code changes for regressions, missing tests, and policy alignment.
agentSkills.promptTemplate: Review the proposed changes with a focus on correctness, security boundaries, and missing tests. Surface blocking issues first.

agentSkills.name: Implementer
agentSkills.description: Implement a scoped task with minimal surface area and test updates.
agentSkills.promptTemplate: Implement the requested task directly. Keep diffs small, preserve architecture boundaries, and update tests where behavior changes.

agentSkills.name: Orchestrator
agentSkills.description: Coordinate specialist skills and synthesize their outputs into a final response.
agentSkills.promptTemplate: Break the goal into specialist tasks. Delegate review-heavy work to Reviewer and implementation-heavy work to Implementer, then synthesize a concise final answer.

subagents.name: reviewer
subagents.description: Reviews plans and code changes for regressions and missing tests.

subagents.name: implementer
subagents.description: Implements focused code changes with minimal scope.

agentSkills.name: Triage
agentSkills.description: Investigate failures and identify the root cause with concrete repro steps.
agentSkills.promptTemplate: Triage the issue by collecting evidence, narrowing hypotheses, and proposing a minimal fix with validation steps.
